name: Kimika
message: "I wonder if everyone can see it."

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, they can. That's why they're all so cheerful... They have to see it."
I stood under the final sky.
It already seemed like I could reach out and touch it.
I'd come to a place where it seemed like my outstretched hand was mere inches from the edge of the universe.
That's why they were all celebrating.
Jumping around on the roof.
They were celebrating the last sky in this world.
The world will end.
So we're all going to return to the sky.
Return to the last sky in the world...
The light from all the stars in the sky rained down on us. How many millions, how many billions of years ago was the light that's illuminating us now emitted?
The light was born in the distant past so that it could illuminate us. It traveled for billions of years to deliver us light.
That's something worth celebrating.
The last sky.
We stood at the edge of the universe.
The place called... End Sky.

name: Kimika
message: "Hey, does it look like the same thing to everyone? Or is it different? How does the End Sky look?"

name: Takuji
message: "What does it look like to you?"

name: Kimika
message: "It's like fireworks in the sky."

name: Takuji
message: "Huh? Wasn't that what came in the Unhappy Meal you saw yesterday?"

name: Kimika
message: "That's right. That's why I think the End Sky is just some cheap piece of crap like the toys they give away at McDonalds!"

name: Takuji
message: "You're a cheap woman, that's why you see such a cheap End Sky."

name: Kimika
message: "Whoa, that's cruel! You're such a meanie, my savior."

name: Takuji
message: "Well, fireworks are really beautiful, so that's okay... Don't you think so, Kimika?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yeah! It's great! Thanks for the fireworks, Unhappy Meal!"

name: Kimika
message: "Right, everyone?!"
Kimika yelled out to the crowd.
Everyone looked at Kimika.

name: Kimika
message: "Can you all see the End Sky? Can you see it?!"

name: Kimika
message: "Do you want to go there?!"

name: Kimika
message: "Whoa! They're all so excited."

name: Kimika
message: "Now then, this is my final question for you all! What does the End Sky look like to you?!"
Everyone screamed at the same time, so I couldn't hear a thing.
Jeez, what's she doing?
They all talked about their own End Sky, one after another. Every one of them yelled at the top of their lungs.

name: Kimika
message: "Ahahahaha, really?! Wow! I couldn't really understand any of that, but I could tell by your enthusiasm! I understand perfectly!"

name: Kimika
message: "This is the last sky!"
Kimika yelled back to the crowd.
Right beside me... so joyfully...

name: Kimika
message: "All right! Destroy that fence!"
Kimika picked up a mallet.
Then several others waved their mallets over their heads.
That stupid woman... She brought mallets too? Or maybe she made the believers gather them?
Actually, now that I look, it seems like someone got hit with one of those.
There's so much blood...
What a silly ritual.

name: Takuji
message: "I thought I told you this was supposed to be a solemn occasion."

name: Kimika
message: "Hahahahahaha! You were too slow!"

name: Takuji
message: "Jeez... They're making a mess of the whole thing."

name: Kimika
message: "Isn't it better this way? Look, they're all having so much fun."

name: Takuji
message: "I guess they are..."

name: Takuji
message: "Not like I care, but you're taking over too many of my responsibilities. Knock it off."

name: Kimika
message: "It'll be okay. I'm going to leave the finale to you, my savior."

name: Believer
message: "W-Wow..."

name: Believer
message: "A colossal cross..."

name: Believer
message: "It looks like... a huge door."

name: Believer
message: "I see a key and a keyhole."
They all tried to put what they saw in the final sky into words.
The world's last sky... How does it appear to them?
The world's final scene.
The world's final words.
People dancing.
People fighting.
People laughing.
People happily destroying the building here under the sky.
People already covered in blood.
The sky peering down on us from overhead.
A dark blue sky, absent the light of the stars, pressed down on us from above.
A beautiful night sky.
Someone set off fireworks.
For some reason, a spark caused a pillar of flame to bellow up from the ground.
Someone brought a can of gasoline...
Some idiot must have brought the gasoline from the generator up here.
A pillar of flame on the rooftop.
A huge pillar of flame.
Several people got caught in the flames and burnt alive.
Even with the drugs, that must have hurt... They had burns all over their bodies.
To an outsider, this sight would look like a peek into hell itself.
Why are they all having so much fun in this hell?
This is the last sky.
The sky of the end.
Looking out from their eyes... what does this final sky look like?
Fireworks.
That's what Kimika said... Fireworks, huh? That's a pretty good answer.
She's right. This sky does look like it's full of fireworks.
The stars twinkled in the sky.
They twinkled like the embers of a skyrocket in bloom...
This is the limit.
The sky where all duality comes to an end.
And thus we looked up at the sky that had taken on the light of the fireworks.

name: Kimika
message: "Now the party is in full swing! I'll leave the rest to our one and only savior!"

name: Kimika
message: "He's everyone's idol, your one and only savior! This is the finale, so make sure you listen closely!"
Pfft... You're the one who's not listening to me.

name: Takuji
message: "This is a mysterious night."

name: Takuji
message: "A night like any other... and yet completely different..."

name: Takuji
message: "But this is most certainly the last stop."

name: Takuji
message: "This place, where we're standing right now... This is the last..."

name: Takuji
message: "So the way forward is simple... We can go at any time."

name: Takuji
message: "We can move forward at any time..."

name: Takuji
message: "Let's take that step... From this spot, from the final sky."

name: Takuji
message: "Take that step!"

name: Kimika
message: "All right, my savior... I guess this is it."

name: Takuji
message: "Kimika?"
Kimika was about to jump, but I stopped her.

name: Takuji
message: "You're last..."

name: Kimika
message: "Wait! Um..."

name: Megu
message: "N-No way, I'm not letting Tachibana go before me!"

name: Satoko
message: "I-I'm first!"
People flying through the sky.
People returning to the sky.
At the edge of the world... the people headed toward the sky.
They extended their arms wider and wider, like they were trying to grab onto the world itself.
The people went to the sky.
Some of them said their farewells to me before they went.
But most of them were taken by passion, and they went screaming and jumping into the sky as soon as they could.
They screamed.
Meaningless words...
Truly meaningless words.
Today feels especially good... especially comfortable.
A cool breeze.
A beautiful blue.
A world of light.
A good day to die.
Someone once said that.
An incredible number of people jumped the smashed fence and flew into the sky.
There were some people who had been injured or burned too badly to move, but others picked them up and threw them into the sky.
They too were sucked into the great blue sky.
Before I knew it... the commotion had disappeared.
The great clamor turned into unbroken silence.
Before I knew it... only Kimika and I stood on the rooftop.
I embraced Kimika on the desolate rooftop.

name: Kimika
message: "Ahahahaha... I'm happy that I can hold your hand at the end."

name: Kimika
message: "But this isn't good..."

name: Takuji
message: "What isn't?"

name: Kimika
message: "I don't deserve happiness."

name: Kimika
message: "I only deserve unhappiness... But... But... I..."
Kimika disentangled her hand from mine.

name: Kimika
message: "My savior, this is it..."

name: Takuji
message: "What?"

name: Kimika
message: "Once I die, it'll all be over."

name: Takuji
message: "Wh-What do you mean?"

name: Kimika
message: "Before I knew about what you had planned... I tried to stop your grand plan..."

name: Takuji
message: "Plan?"

name: Kimika
message: "That's right... I'm sorry that I didn't understand."

name: Takuji
message: "What are you talking about?"

name: Kimika
message: "It should've been me, my savior."

name: Kimika
message: "...I'm the one who absolutely has to die."

name: Kimika
message: "I have to fall from a high place... and splatter myself all over the ground... and die."

name: Kimika
message: "That's right. I should've died... I have to die... And of course, I have to end my life with my own hands."

name: Takuji
message: "...With your own hands?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yes! Because I betrayed her. I betrayed Zakuro."

name: Kimika
message: "She tried to talk to me, but I betrayed her."

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah... I know."

name: Kimika
message: "But honestly, even after I betrayed her, she never hated me. I couldn't forgive her for that."

name: Kimika
message: "As much as the girls who bullied us... No, even more than them. I couldn't forgive her."

name: Kimika
message: "Why didn't she hate me? Why didn't she ever want to get revenge?"

name: Kimika
message: "Why? What made her do that? Why wouldn't she hate me? Why didn't she curse me? Why did she smile at me?"

name: Kimika
message: "Just thinking about that made me so, so, so mad that I couldn't take it. She annoyed me so much... I couldn't stand it."

name: Kimika
message: "I don't give two shits about Megu or Satoko... I couldn't care less if they died..."

name: Kimika
message: "To me, only Zakuro mattered. She was the most important figure in my life. She never hated me... She always smiled at me... And I couldn't forgive her for that. It was so hard."

name: Kimika
message: "I wanted to kill her."

name: Kimika
message: "So when she died and the curse reared its head... I was incredibly happy."

name: Kimika
message: "I was so happy."

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, Zakuro finally got mad at me. She finally hates me."

name: Kimika
message: "Now she can actually see me for what I am..."

name: Kimika
message: "Now she's finally seeing me as human."

name: Kimika
message: "Not looking down on me from upon high, but instead standing next to me."
Looking at her...
I see...
Takashima Zakuro certainly did save Tachibana Kimika from persecution.
I heard that Zakuro was bullied in her place.
But to Kimika, it's not like that.
To Kimika, who was ignored while Zakuro was bullied, it was an unforgivable act of betrayal.
It was the same as ignoring her own existence.
Since Takashima Zakuro refused to face Tachibana directly... she could never have been Tachibana's friend...
For Tachibana, their relationship wasn't one between two equals because Takashima refused to get angry or hate her.
Takashima-san's good will must have weighed more heavily on her shoulders than any insult.
Sometimes, good intentions can cause far more evil than bad ones... The road to hell is paved with good intentions.
Takashima-san's good intentions must have seemed like haughty pride or pity.

name: Kimika
message: "You know... I've always wondered about something since I was a child."

name: Kimika
message: "There's one thing I could just never, ever understand."

name: Kimika
message: "Haven't you heard people say that a person who dies after committing a grave sin is only running away... That they should live and pay back their debt to society..."
She looked to the sky and spat out those words under her breath.

name: Kimika
message: "What's up with that?"

name: Kimika
message: "I don't understand at all. Live and pay it back? Even though the person you commited the sin against is dead?"

name: Kimika
message: "What if the person is dead? How can you make recompense to the dead by living on in this life?"

name: Kimika
message: "You have to look someone in the eyes before you can ever make amends. How should a living person look the dead in the eyes? All that crap is just stuff people say to make themselves feel better."

name: Kimika
message: "To make amends to the dead, one has to be dead... That much should be obvious."

name: Kimika
message: "In the past, revenge was seen as virtuous... The only way to satisfy a dead man's anger is to kill the person who killed him."

name: Kimika
message: "That's just common sense."

name: Kimika
message: "Or as you would put it, it's a truth that the liars have hidden away from the world."

name: Kimika
message: "A death can only be repaid with another death."

name: Kimika
message: "So once Zakuro died... there was only one way to pay for my sins."

name: Kimika
message: "Death."

name: Kimika
message: "The people who bullied her, and all the people who saw it happening and did nothing... All of them had to die."

name: Kimika
message: "That was the only true way for us to atone."

name: Kimika
message: "Hehe, isn't that messed up? How can the living repay the dead?"

name: Kimika
message: "A change of heart? Or maybe just by apologizing? Or should they work to prevent any further deaths? Hehe... If you told them of their sins, they would swear any of those in an instant."

name: Kimika
message: "They would just say they bullied her because the world was unfair, or because they were scared about the future."

name: Kimika
message: "So they would swear any oath you asked them to. Please forgive us, we swear this will never happen again!"

name: Kimika
message: "Hehe, liars, liars, fucking liars..."

name: Kimika
message: "Only death can repay the dead. That's obvious. The only thing that carries the same value as death is death."

name: Kimika
message: "My death, and the death of all the rest of them... We all have to die."

name: Kimika
message: "We have to die the same way she did, or if not a more gruesome death than hers."

name: Kimika
message: "That's why..."

name: Kimika
message: "When I first heard about you online... my mind went blank for a moment."

name: Kimika
message: "Who the fuck is this? Who does he think he is? The savior?"

name: Kimika
message: "So when I met you, I asked...
You think you can stop the curse? Don't fuck with me!"

name: Kimika
message: "He's an enemy. He's a demon trying to erase Zakuro's feelings."

name: Kimika
message: "So I have to stop him. I have to kill him..."

name: Kimika
message: "Zakuro's curse is real. She had every right to curse us. I wouldn't let anyone stop her curse, not even God himself."

name: Kimika
message: "That's why I approached you."

name: Kimika
message: "I was going to kill you for trying to stop Zakuro's curse."

name: Kimika
message: "But you were different. I was totally mistaken."

name: Kimika
message: "I understood everything on the first day... On that day..."

name: Kimika
message: "I watched you, my savior. I found your secret base, and I saw what was on your computer."

name: Kimika
message: "I was really surprised... Like, this guy is really incredible."

name: Kimika
message: "You were trying to kill way more people than I was... You wanted to return not only yourself but as many other people as you could to the sky..."

name: Kimika
message: "The sky... where Zakuro is, where her soul is enshrined. That's where you wanted to send as many people as possible."

name: Kimika
message: "I thought it was probably something you were doing for your own gain."

name: Kimika
message: "But I knew I had to kill as many other people as possible for basically the same reason as you."

name: Kimika
message: "I knew you were trying to kill a great number of people... No, return them to the sky."

name: Kimika
message: "So I knew you were the same as me... That made you Zakuro's ally."

name: Takuji
message: "Kimika..."

name: Kimika
message: "Soon, I realized you had Zakuro's cell phone too. Every time I reported back to you where Senagawa was... her phone would ring."

name: Kimika
message: "Even a fool could've figured out that you were the one sending those messages."

name: Kimika
message: "But you were making mistakes. Sometimes you forgot to send the messages..."

name: Kimika
message: "Sometimes you would space out and start talking to yourself... I got tired of waiting for you to get stuff done, so I started doing everything myself."

name: Kimika
message: "I made Senagawa feel true fear... and killed her."

name: Kimika
message: "I honestly thought that was an amazing plan. I never would've thought of that..."

name: Kimika
message: "Which made me think, this guy is a bit airheaded, but he really is the savior. I don't know what the other people thought, but to me you really were the savior."

name: Kimika
message: "I probably hated Senagawa Yui more than Zakuro herself did."

name: Kimika
message: "I don't actually know who Zakuro hated the most, but..."

name: Kimika
message: "But when you said that Zakuro hated Senagawa the most... my heart fluttered."

name: Kimika
message: "Amazing. This guy is amazing. He understands. He's speaking the truth."

name: Kimika
message: "I don't know about Zakuro, but I know that I never could've forgiven Senagawa. I wanted to make her die a more gruesome death than anyone else."

name: Kimika
message: "That's why I was amazed by your plan."

name: Kimika
message: "If possible, I would've liked...
to make Akasaka Megu and Kitami Satoko die in utter terror like she did."

name: Kimika
message: "So I did my best to think something up..."

name: Kimika
message: "But in the end, I just decided to leave it to you."

name: Kimika
message: "You were the one who made Zakuro's curse into a reality, so I knew you were the only one who could make my wish come true."

name: Kimika
message: "You're the savior... You're my savior..."

name: Kimika
message: "No one really looked at me... No one ever looked at me... Not even Zakuro was really looking at me..."

name: Kimika
message: "She was just a good girl... She was incredibly kind, and her soul was beautiful. That's the only reason she talked to me."

name: Kimika
message: "You're the only one who truly looked at me for who I am... You really talked to me, looked me in the eyes, got mad at me, laughed with me, got annoyed with me... You showed me all these emotions."

name: Kimika
message: "You're a boy, but you don't seem interested in sex at all...
Well, I guess you do jerk off a lot."

name: Takuji
message: "What did you say?"

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, but I do that too...
Just once in a while, though."

name: Kimika
message: "We went up on the roof to hear the God's song, right?"

name: Kimika
message: "I was totally tripping, so I kept rambling about cows and stuff... Hehehe."

name: Kimika
message: "But you know, I really did hear God's song."

name: Kimika
message: "I found out that the difference between the world and God... is the difference between words and music."

name: Kimika
message: "I felt that truth deep in my soul."

name: Kimika
message: "No one could've told me that... No one knew that... Teachers, parents, writers, politicians―they're all the same. They just talk about boring crap."

name: Kimika
message: "But you taught me so many things..."

name: Kimika
message: "The world is cruel... and the world is impure, but
it's also incredibly beautiful."

name: Kimika
message: "That night... we sang, and danced, and screamed, and spun around till we fell to the ground. All the stars fell from the sky, and everything in the world glittered just for me..."

name: Kimika
message: "I realized that's what it was all about."

name: Kimika
message: "It was something you said before, my savior. You can't measure the world's value only by the time you spend in it... And you can't measure its value with meaning either."

name: Kimika
message: "That night, I tried to measure the weight of the world with that scale..."

name: Kimika
message: "And when I did, the world's weight was exactly the same as God's weight!"

name: Kimika
message: "In that very moment, the world was the exact same weight as God..."

name: Kimika
message: "Dance, dance, dance with the music..."

name: Kimika
message: "Dance with the savior... Dance through the universe..."

name: Kimika
message: "Dance outside the cage..."

name: Kimika
message: "The world's first dance outside the cage."

name: Kimika
message: "So now... it's over."

name: Kimika
message: "This is the end."

name: Kimika
message: "But... now that I've killed all these people, I understand for the first time..."

name: Kimika
message: "The meaning of the words 'Live on and repay your debt.'"

name: Kimika
message: "I know that it's selfish for me to ask you this! B-But..."

name: Kimika
message: "My savior, you... At least you should continue to live!"

name: Kimika
message: "Even if no one else, at least you... Please live on and repay our debt."

name: Kimika
message: "I'll be the final death."

name: Kimika
message: "The last life that needs to be sacrificed to Zakuro is mine."

name: Kimika
message: "Sometimes I wonder if this really was a curse."

name: Kimika
message: "I was never scared of dying..."

name: Kimika
message: "But that's only because I never had any regrets."

name: Kimika
message: "I can't believe that now, at the very end, I've found one thing to regret."

name: Kimika
message: "Ahaha... I can't believe I fell in love just before the end."

name: Kimika
message: "I want someone to make love to me, even just once."

name: Kimika
message: "I have one regret in my life..."

name: Takuji
message: "Kimika..."

name: Kimika
message: "But... I can't! I can't do that."

name: Kimika
message: "If I do everything I want to do before I die, I won't truly be able to atone for my mistakes."

name: Kimika
message: "I have to atone for what I did to her..."

name: Kimika
message: "I made her curse come true, so my dance with you, and with God, was just a little reward."

name: Kimika
message: "If that gave some value to my world, then that's enough. That reward is enough to give my world some meaning."

name: Kimika
message: "All that's left is for me to atone."

name: Kimika
message: "So... please, my savior, stay here."
Just like that, her body... Just like that...
The world tilted at a diagonal.
Kimika's body wasn't parallel with the world anymore.
She moved from the world of parallel lines to the one of free fall, two irreconcilable worlds.
She was sucked down.
She said,
this is my atonement.
She said.
this is enough.
She said,
this is the value of my world.
I think.
That's a load of shit.
Who cares about the world?
Who cares about atonement?
Who cares about Takashima?
Who cares about the curse?
Who cares about death?
I want to embrace her.
I just want to hold her close.
I don't care if I live on.
I don't care if anyone lives on.
The world,
me,
Kimika.
None of us need to live on.
Everything can just disappear.
I just,
I just want
to hold her in my arms.
Even if it's just for one second before death.
Even if it's just a glitter in a fleeting world,
I want to feel the warmth of her living body.
So I jumped.

name: Kimika
message: "Ah!"

name: Takuji
message: "Kimika!"
Complete freefall.
I never intended to survive the fall,
I never intended to save Kimika...
No, in truth, I wanted her to live.
Even if I die, I want her to live.
But...
That wish will never be fulfilled.
A dream I can never grasp...
In a few seconds, she and I will splatter onto the concrete.
We'll probably just be deformed piles of flesh.
But...
Even so...
I want to hold Kimika.
I want to hold her tight.
I just want to hold her tight... here in freefall.
Simply feeling her warmth is enough for me.
When she saw me, Kimika cried and said...

name: Kimika
message: "You dummy..."
She was crying, but she seemed happy too.
She seemed very sad, but also very happy.
I'm sure she was struggling with a lot of emotions.
I felt that her happiness outweighed all the rest.
She smiled and hugged me back.
She squeezed me tight.
I'll never let you go.
I've always wanted to do this.
She said that to me with something much faster than words.
There are things that travel much faster than words.
There are things that ring much truer than words.
Even in those fleeting moments, the world holds meaning.
The world holds significance.
The end is coming.
The final moment.
Ah...
Sirens in the distance.
The black sky.
The laughing moon.
The dew upon the earth.
The dancing stars.
The cool air.
Something warm within me.
Tachibana Kimika...
As I held her in my arms... she silently closed her eyes.
And then I also...
quietly closed my eyes.
